intent_statement: Make BuilderOS itself truthful, mechanically enforceable, self-improving, and founder-UI-proven before further expansion.
primary_user: Adam in Founder Mode through the LifeOS/Lumin UI
required_outcome: No false-green queue completion while Point B is founder-incomplete
No silent stop on repairable failure
No stale receipt pretending live truth
definition_of_done: Closure acceptance script exists and passes
Point-B false-green regression is impossible under the acceptance suite
Self-repair escalation policy is shared and enforced
Founder-UI proof path succeeds or blocks honestly
Certification and readiness artifacts reflect actual proof state
